title: Meta prepares to lay off a tenth of its workforce
description: The owner of Facebook and Instagram will cut 8,000 jobs next month and more later in the year as it spends hundreds of billions on artificial intelligence
content:
Meta Platforms is said to be planning a wave of sweeping job cuts involving thousands of staff worldwide starting next month with more to follow later in the year.

title: How artificial intelligence is changing business interaction with customers
description: Businesses say they are using AI to speed up service delivery and improve the customer experience, but economists warn this may be the "calm before the storm".
content:

title: On cards, AI as core subject in Punjab schools
description: The Education Department is all set to introduce artificial intelligence (AI) as a core subject in schools during the current academic session.
content:
The Education Department is all set to introduce artificial intelligence (AI) as a core subject in schools during the current academic session.

description: From an advertisement for an herbal remedy that promises to cure all to a video featuring a voice that sounds just like a movie star, you’ve surely encountered spam and scam advertisements online.
